---
title: 'Images'
date: '2011-01-02T02:00:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4423925014859466872'
blogger_filename: '/2011/01/images.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="232" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cover-art-e0f7cc956c34.png" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sweet-spot-deb4478fee2b.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="265" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sweet-spot-deb4478fee2b.png" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20131013-174116-f094e6c84a0d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="238" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20131013-174116-f094e6c84a0d.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140121-144307-c144bdaef1e0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="238" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140121-144307-c144bdaef1e0.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/minion-t-shirt-at-target-perfect-for-scringy-who-always-gets-distracted-by-mike-50117c8e9df0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/minion-t-shirt-at-target-perfect-for-scringy-who-always-gets-distracted-by-mike-50117c8e9df0.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/listening-is-an-act-of-love-by-david-robert-bilwas-706c8a288ab3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="215" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/listening-is-an-act-of-love-by-david-robert-bilwas-706c8a288ab3.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/in-god-we-trust-by-aaron-van-dorn-b5c40adaa97a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="215" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/in-god-we-trust-by-aaron-van-dorn-b5c40adaa97a.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/all-rights-reserved-lion-tongue-by-doug-wheller-345f77e711c2.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/all-rights-reserved-lion-tongue-by-doug-wheller-345f77e711c2.jpg" width="305" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiESXu1G0kLLejsnXnt-G4fDMPHCQUwEMqjuhTlODQBHDcB-8ypDWmDKXcxX32PHZHYADehGITDFZ6bLqSTMTepoZz-0WSq4hr3hltSXrsOUZIWkd4LiZunOLohzfH_20shDk71T-DNVsU/s1600/I+voted++Tony+Alter+-+Vote+-+it+doesn't%2Bmatter%2Bif%2Bwe%2Bagree%2C%2Bbut%2Bdon't%2Bcomplain%2Bif%2Byou%2Bdon't%2Blike%2Bwhat%2Bis%2Bhappening%2Band%2Byou%2Bdid%2Bnot%2Bvote..jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="238" src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEiESXu1G0kLLejsnXnt-G4fDMPHCQUwEMqjuhTlODQBHDcB-8ypDWmDKXcxX32PHZHYADehGITDFZ6bLqSTMTepoZz-0WSq4hr3hltSXrsOUZIWkd4LiZunOLohzfH_20shDk71T-DNVsU/s1600/I+voted++Tony+Alter+-+Vote+-+it+doesn't%2Bmatter%2Bif%2Bwe%2Bagree%2C%2Bbut%2Bdon't%2Bcomplain%2Bif%2Byou%2Bdon't%2Blike%2Bwhat%2Bis%2Bhappening%2Band%2Byou%2Bdid%2Bnot%2Bvote..jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/shin-2-7c2f64438ac5.jpeg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/shin-2-7c2f64438ac5.jpeg" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/spock-837c90a81284.jpeg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/spock-837c90a81284.jpeg" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/he-who-has-more-will-be-given-penny-darrellwolfedotcom-ed28a72c1bff.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="238" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/he-who-has-more-will-be-given-penny-darrellwolfedotcom-ed28a72c1bff.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/trust-and-walk-licenseattribution-some-rights-reserved-by-symphony-of-love-9de036b6f2b1.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="217" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/trust-and-walk-licenseattribution-some-rights-reserved-by-symphony-of-love-9de036b6f2b1.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/buffett-quote-2bfd56bf3de8.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="213" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/buffett-quote-2bfd56bf3de8.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/being-happy-license-attribution-some-rights-reserved-by-celestine-chua-62accd13108a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="213" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/being-happy-license-attribution-some-rights-reserved-by-celestine-chua-62accd13108a.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/glass-if-full-full-license-attribution-some-rights-reserved-by-celestine-chua-d21ba2340b46.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="213" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/glass-if-full-full-license-attribution-some-rights-reserved-by-celestine-chua-d21ba2340b46.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bankingbasicsforbelievers-cover-final-e14468a82559.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bankingbasicsforbelievers-cover-final-e14468a82559.jpg" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/microphone-freefoto-e515d0ef1a91.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/microphone-freefoto-e515d0ef1a91.jpg" width="211" /></a></div><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/dw-cover-a3cf9e22e141.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="56" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/dw-cover-a3cf9e22e141.png" width="400" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blogger-header-2015-a17f5335ce26.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="115" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blogger-header-2015-a17f5335ce26.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blogger-header-2015-6e7bc7489f4e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="156" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blogger-header-2015-6e7bc7489f4e.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blogger-header-2015-4903093f375b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="138" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blogger-header-2015-4903093f375b.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blogger-header-2015-957f45a9af1d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="101" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blogger-header-2015-957f45a9af1d.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/d-blogger-cover-f290d5f821de.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="66" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/d-blogger-cover-f290d5f821de.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/d-blogger-cover-baf084efc6e3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="66" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/d-blogger-cover-baf084efc6e3.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blog-cover-gray-018a8d1d1dca.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="192" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blog-cover-gray-018a8d1d1dca.png" width="400" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blog-cover-grey-95496321b825.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="203" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blog-cover-grey-95496321b825.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blog-cover-photo-c7af5b0411bd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="203" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blog-cover-photo-c7af5b0411bd.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blogger-header-0a7139da7422.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="145" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/blogger-header-0a7139da7422.jpg" width="400" /></a></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/amazon-button-288c2ae5db57.gif" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/amazon-button-288c2ae5db57.gif" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-icon-321a46162ea4.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-icon-6afc35be482b.png" width="319" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-logo-bbd97571eab7.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="213" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-logo-5d63cfba2fb1.png" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-logo-square-webtreatsetc-f768eb7bf4c9.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-logo-square-webtreatsetc-f768eb7bf4c9.png" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/linkedin-round-913ba05db223.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/linkedin-round-913ba05db223.jpg" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/round-facebook-icon-520x403-9ff02adf900e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/round-facebook-icon-520x403-9ff02adf900e.jpg" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/round-twitter-bird-058658cc8ccf.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/round-twitter-bird-058658cc8ccf.jpg" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-logo-8fa19ebc1d6e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-logo-dc04c42da15f.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-round-d7d1b652d189.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-round-202c3cc9978d.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-99ce47eb833d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-99ce47eb833d.jpg" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/social-twitter-button-blue-3afbb507edb9.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/social-twitter-button-blue-9c322678a015.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-and-facebook-logo-dd78ac22cebd.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="180" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-and-facebook-logo-fde3742e6015.png" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-icon-9fd2111fd241.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-icon-9fd2111fd241.jpg" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-icon-8813efb77cd8.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-icon-8813efb77cd8.png" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-logo-ea5a3b605c13.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="319" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-logo-40f78d4b2283.png" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-bird2-square-webtreatsetc-6386fd21c71d.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-bird2-square-webtreatsetc-6386fd21c71d.png" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtube-icon-33bb3e46d0cb.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtube-icon-58e2f80e88d3.jpg" width="320" /></a></div><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtubecc-round-5354caf0c98c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtubecc-round-5354caf0c98c.jpg" /></a></div><br />
